name: relayplay-monorepo
description: AI-friendly TypeScript framework for server-relayed live races and low-frequency multiplayer interactions.

scripts.typecheck: tsc -b --pretty false && tsc -p tooling/tsconfig.json --pretty false && tsc -p test/tsconfig.json --pretty false
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm run build && npm run test:cloudflare
scripts.dev:example: concurrently --kill-others --names worker,web --prefix-colors magenta,cyan "npm run dev:worker --workspace @relayplay/example-live-race" "npm run dev --workspace @relayplay/example-live-race"
